failed_attempts:
let k := (a ^ 2 + b ^ 2) / (a * b + 1)
  have hk : a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 = k * (a * b + 1) := (Nat.div_mul_cancel h₁).symm
  suffices IsSquare k by
    rcases this with ⟨x, rfl⟩; use x; rw [← Nat.cast_pow, hk, mul_div_cancel_right₀]; norm_cast; nlinarith
  let S := { p : ℕ × ℕ | 0 < p.1 ∧ 0 < p.2 ∧ p.1 ^ 2 + p.2 ^ 2 = k * (p.1 * p.2 + 1) }
  have claim : ∀ s, ∀ p ∈ S, p.1 + p.2 = s → IsSquare k := by
    intro s; induction s using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h s ih =>
    intro p hp hs; rcases p with ⟨A, B⟩; dsimp at hp hs
    wlog h_le : B ≤ A generalizing A B
    · exact this B A ⟨hp.2.1, hp.1, by rwa [add_comm, mul_comm]⟩ (by rwa [add_comm]) (le_of_not_le h_le)
    have h_eq : A^2 + B^2 = k * (A * B + 1) := hp.2.2
    have h_bound : A ≤ k * B := by
      by_contra h; push_neg at h
      have h1 : A * (A - k * B) = k - B^2 := by zify [h.le] at *; nlinarith [h_eq]
      have h2 : k - B^2 < k := Nat.sub_lt_self (by nlinarith [hp.2.1]) (by nlinarith [hp.2.1])
      apply lt_irrefl k
      calc k ≤ k * B := Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right k hp.2.1
           _ < A := h
           _ ≤ A * (A - k * B) := Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right _ (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt h)
           _ = k - B^2 := h1
           _ < k := h2
    let x := k * B - A
    have hx_eq : x^2 + B^2 = k * (x * B + 1) := by
      zify [h_bound]
      calc (k * B - A : ℤ)^2 + B^2 = k^2 * B^2 - 2 * k * B * A + (A^2 + B^2) := by ring
        _ = k * ((k * B - A) * B + 1) := by rw [← Nat.cast_pow, ← Nat.cast_pow, ← Nat.cast_add, h_eq]; ring
    by_cases hx0 : x = 0
    · exact ⟨B, by rw [hx0] at hx_eq; simp at hx_eq; exact hx_eq.symm⟩
    · have hx_pos : 0 < x := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hx0
      have hx_lt : x < A := by
         have : A * x = B^2 - k := by zify [h_bound]; nlinarith [h_eq]
         have : A * x < A * A := by
           rw [this]
           apply lt_of_lt_of_le _ (Nat.mul_le_mul_left A h_le)
           apply Nat.sub_lt_self
           · refine Nat.pos_of_mul_pos_right ?_ (Nat.zero_le (A*B+1)); rw [←h_eq]; nlinarith [hp.1]
           · nlinarith [hp.2.1]
         exact Nat.lt_of_mul_lt_mul_left this (Nat.pos_of_gt hp.1)
      refine ih (x + B) (by linarith) (x, B) ⟨hx_pos, hp.2.1, hx_eq⟩ rfl
  exact claim (a + b) (a, b) ⟨h₀.1, h₀.2, hk⟩ rfl
